subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the Book, and made manifest the proof, and caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the Single One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الکتاب و اظهرنا البرهان و انطقنا الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
